rows.description: Hill Repairs at Goslings farm
rows.notes: Visual verification revealed the amount as '12' in the shillings column and '14' in the pence column. Both extractors attempted to interpret this. gemini-flash correctly identified '14' pence needing conversion but incorrectly converted it to '1 shilling and 4 pence' (should be '1 shilling and 2 pence'). gpt-5-mini misread the columns as '12 pounds 18 shillings 4 pence'. My extraction correctly interprets '12 shillings 14 pence' as 13 shillings and 2 pence. Description 'at Goslings farm' is a combination of both extractors, aligning with the image more accurately.
